### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [https://billbill.com/](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fbillbill.com%2F) ### Comment > #概述 > 此问题由“拦截 ETag 和 If - None - Match 标头”功能造成，关闭后恢复正常。 > > ##已造成的问题（**以复现成功率，从高到低排序**） > 1. 非AD营销界面无法加载，即使相关过滤器已关闭。 > 2. 其他用户的个人空间无法加载。 > 3. 视频/直播加载失败，或相关功能（如评论、点赞）不可用，即使相关过滤器已关闭。 > 4. 视频刷新失败。 > 5. 主页加载失败。 > > ###附注 > 1. 已尝试使用AdGuard DNS 私人服务器，并对本地与服务器过滤日志进行审查。除部分域名被错误屏蔽外（*正式测试与审查前已加入白名单*），未发现过滤器问题。 > 2. 以下议题可能与此问题有关: > -#229486. > -#229490. > --AdGuardTeam/AdGuardDNS#1023 ``` Username: @Tayg2048 ``` ### Screenshots

comment.body: #231412 报告的问题在Harmony OS 2上存在，且不受“拦截 ETag 和 If - None - Match 标头”功能开关影响。我发现，此功能的关闭只能解决部分问题并缓解其它问题。

comment.body:
Unfortunately, the site has too few visitors for our [policy](https://adguard.com/kb/general/ad-filtering/filter-policy/). Add
```
kuchikomi.tv##a[href="https://www.kuchikomi.tv/ed/"] > img
```

to User rules.

issue.title: www.yahoo.com

labels.name: A: Problematic
labels.description: Issues, which cannot be resolved easily

issue.body:
# Sorry. The website is infected by AdShield, Inc.

Unfortunately, It is complicated to resolve with a regular adblock rule because the website is being protected by service of Ad-Shield that is an anti-adblock company.

## Userscript Installation
Please block Ad-Shield advertisement by installing [tinyShield userscript](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield).
Please check its installation guideline written in English by visiting [this URL](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.md).

If you can understand Korean language, please refer https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.ko.md.

New change of tinyShield's build script for Apple Safari Extension user is available.

## Still Have a Problem?
An issue is occurred when the userscript is applied, please report to [this issue tracker](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/issues).

issue.title: rutube ads
issue.body:
### Prerequisites

- [x] This site DOES NOT contain sexually explicit material, otherwise use [NSFW-specific form](./new?template=bug_report_NSFW.yml);
- [x] Filters were updated before reproducing an issue;
- [x] AdGuard product version is up-to-date;
- [x] Browser version is up-to-date;
- [x] If the site or app is broken, disabling AdGuard protection resolves an issue.

### What product do you use?

AdGuard Browser Extension

### AdGuard version

5.4.3.1

### What type of problem have you encountered?

Missed ads or ad leftovers

### Which browser(s) do you use?

Chrome

### Which device do you use?

Desktop

### Where is the problem encountered?

https://rutube.ru/video/5c20f4bb14ac431e06016cd0dba2d401/

### Ad Blocking

AdGuard Base filter

### Privacy

_No response_

### Social Widgets

_No response_

### Annoyances

_No response_

### Security

_No response_

### Other

_No response_

### DNS filters

_No response_

### Language-specific

AdGuard Russian filter

### What Stealth Mode options do you have enabled?

_No response_

### Add your comment and screenshots

Got rid of the ad with these custom rules — once I added them to the user filter, Rutube preroll/midroll stopped playing while the main video kept working fine:

  ||a.rutube.ru/api/v1/ad^
  ||yast.rutube.ru/gowast/
  ||ssp.rutube.ru^
  ||pic.rutube.ru/ssp/
  ||goya.rutube.ru/v2/adonline/
  ||goya.rutube.ru/v2/banner/

  Before that the ad was breaking through the default filters — Rutube falls back to its own SSP (a.rutube.ru/api/v1/ad returning VAST, pic.rutube.ru/ssp/*.mp4 as the creative) when ADFOX is
   blocked, so the bundled rules didn't catch it.


### Privacy

- [x] I agree to follow this condition

comment.body:
This issue has been automatically marked as stale because it has been open for 3 days with no activity.
Unfortunately, our resources are limited and we can not always take the time to respond to requests about websites that are not popular enough. The issue will be closed if no further activity occurs.
Please note, that AdGuard Filters is an open-source project that is used by different content blockers and we welcome contributions. If you have some technical knowledge about how websites work, you are welcome to create a pull request following [these instructions](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md).

comment.body:
Naprawione w https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/commit/89bc9e7dd77f0526ff26f13448627846f036921b
Niestety ze względu na politykę Google, rozszerzenie oparte o MV3 nie może aktualizować filtrów, więc nowe reguły będą dostępne dopiero w jednej z kolejnych aktualizacji rozszerzenia.
Do tego czasu możesz dodać poniższe reguły do reguł użytkownika:
```adblock
select.wp.pl,so-magazyn.pl,kafeteria.pl,informacje.wp.pl,wplatform.media,pcformat.pl,staszownews.pl,zdrowienews.pl,kurierostrowiecki.pl,ostrowiec24.info,kielce112.pl,lublinnews.pl,lovelifestyle.pl,telefan24.pl,marketing-zone.pl,panoramaplock.pl,ipolska24.pl,dzieckopoznan.pl,historiapoznania.pl,sportpoznan.pl,pysznosci.pl,kultura.wp.pl,jastrzabpost.pl,wirtualnemedia.pl,open.fm,deliciousmagazine.pl,poczta.wp.pl,pilot.wp.pl,polygamia.pl,abczdrowie.pl,money.pl,dobreprogramy.pl,o2.pl,gadzetomania.pl,komorkomania.pl,autocentrum.pl,pudelek.pl,vpolshchi.pl,parenting.pl,autokult.pl,fotoblogia.pl,dom.wp.pl,pogoda.wp.pl,gry.wp.pl,wroclaw.wp.pl,moto.wp.pl,wideo.wp.pl,kuchnia.wp.pl,facet.wp.pl,sportowefakty.wp.pl,turystyka.wp.pl,magazyn.wp.pl,kobieta.wp.pl,ksiazki.wp.pl,tech.wp.pl,opinie.wp.pl,teleshow.wp.pl,gwiazdy.wp.pl,film.wp.pl,wiadomosci.wp.pl,finanse.wp.pl#%#//scriptlet('trusted-create-element', 'head', 'script', '', '(()=>{const t={apply:(t,r,e)=>{let o=r;try{const t=o?.length;t&&t>10&&t<30&&(n=o,Array.isArray(n)&&0!==n.length&&n.some((t=>"function"==typeof t&&!!t.toString().includes("ABDetector"))))&&(o=[])}catch(t){}var n;return Reflect.apply(t,o,e)}};window.Array.prototype.map=new Proxy(window.Array.prototype.map,t)})();')
select.wp.pl,so-magazyn.pl,kafeteria.pl,informacje.wp.pl,wplatform.media,pcformat.pl,staszownews.pl,zdrowienews.pl,kurierostrowiecki.pl,ostrowiec24.info,kielce112.pl,lublinnews.pl,lovelifestyle.pl,telefan24.pl,marketing-zone.pl,panoramaplock.pl,ipolska24.pl,dzieckopoznan.pl,historiapoznania.pl,sportpoznan.pl,pysznosci.pl,kultura.wp.pl,jastrzabpost.pl,wirtualnemedia.pl,open.fm,deliciousmagazine.pl,poczta.wp.pl,pilot.wp.pl,polygamia.pl,abczdrowie.pl,money.pl,dobreprogramy.pl,o2.pl,gadzetomania.pl,komorkomania.pl,autocentrum.pl,pudelek.pl,vpolshchi.pl,parenting.pl,autokult.pl,fotoblogia.pl,dom.wp.pl,pogoda.wp.pl,gry.wp.pl,wroclaw.wp.pl,moto.wp.pl,wideo.wp.pl,kuchnia.wp.pl,facet.wp.pl,sportowefakty.wp.pl,turystyka.wp.pl,magazyn.wp.pl,kobieta.wp.pl,ksiazki.wp.pl,tech.wp.pl,opinie.wp.pl,teleshow.wp.pl,gwiazdy.wp.pl,film.wp.pl,wiadomosci.wp.pl,finanse.wp.pl#%#//scriptlet('remove-cookie', '/^WPsad/')
```

comment.body:
1. Caused by DNS and it requires you to view an ad to get the reward. So will not be unblocked.

2. New Tab element cannot be filtered by Extension. Please install AdGuard for Windows.
